title: School setup
subtitle: Get started with ClassForge
templateDescription: Choose a template to pre-fill common settings
wizardSubtitle: Complete each step to configure your school for timetable generation
step1Description: Add the year levels at your school (e.g. Year 1, Year 2, … Year 10).
step2Description: Add the subjects taught at your school. Each subject gets a color for the timetable.
step3Description: Add the classrooms and special rooms at your school.
step4Description: Enable teaching days and define a period schedule to apply to all of them.
step5Description: Add teachers who will be assigned to lessons. You can set their qualifications and availability later.
step6Description: Set how many periods per week each subject should be taught per year.
step7Description: Review your school configuration before completing setup.
addYearFirst: Add at least one year to continue
addSubjectFirst: Add at least one subject to continue
addRoomFirst: Add at least one room to continue
addTeacherFirst: Add at least one teacher to continue
enableSchoolDayFirst: Enable at least one school day to continue.
addPeriodFirst: Add at least one period to the template to continue.
noSubjectsAvailable: No subjects available — add subjects in step 2 first.
noYearsFound: No years found — go back and add years first.
incompleteSetupNote: Some sections are not configured yet. You can still complete setup and configure them later from the sidebar.
